item.title: Turkish Petroleum starts drilling Black Sea exploration well
item.description: Deepwater Kandira-2 well lies near state-owned player's Goktepe gas find and a Shell-operated licence in Bulgaria

item.title: New Fortress’ Brazil spin-off strikes lease deal for FSRU-based terminal
item.description: No details given of new lease and capacity holder for facility that has been in works since 2017

item.title: Cadeler seeks funding for new foundation vessels in tightening market
item.description: Cadeler pulling no punches in ambition to provide full-scope solutions

item.title: UK takeover shelved following consent delays
item.description: Deltic Energy says deal with Viaro Bidco is off

item.title: Yinson quietly confident about winning major FPSO contract
item.description: Tangkulo project in Indonesia is the prime target

item.title: Tanker ablaze after fresh attack offshore Qatar
item.description: Crew battled fire after vessel struck by two projectiles

item.title: Petronas sees uptick in interest in Malaysia acreage offering
item.description: Middle East tensions spark investor interest in 2026 licensing round

item.title: Petronas sees growing interest in Malaysia acreage offering
item.description: Middle East tensions spark investor interest in 2026 licensing round

item.title: Inpex, Pertamina to ‘proactively pursue’ Abadi LNG
item.description: Duo extends MoU on strategic collaboration

item.title: Inpex and Pertamina to ‘proactively pursue’ Abadi LNG
item.description: Duo extends MoU on strategic collaboration

item.title: Marginal fields could be key to easing APAC energy security pressure, say executives
item.description: Panellists at OTC Asia say marginal and mature fields are growth opportunities for smaller producers in Asia Pacific

item.title: ‘Number of weeks’ to resume full production at Australian LNG project
item.description: Chevron’s 8.9 million tonnes per annum Wheatstone project still out of action

item.title: ‘Cusp of a possible outright energy disaster’: Petronas CEO
item.description: World would come to a ‘grinding halt’ if hydrocarbons stop flowing

item.title: Aussie E&P company outlines 'unacceptable' elements in takeover approach
item.description: Cue Energy raises concerns to Australia's Takeovers Panel

item.title: Shell says Australia windfall tax would deter investment and undermine energy security
item.description: Government considering ways to capitalise on spike in global gas prices, considering hitting LNG exporters

item.title: Bid deadline looms for neglected Nova Scotia offshore play
item.description: Canada government and province say current call for bids will be the first of many

item.title: US Gulf drillers now free to ignore key endangered species law
item.description: US government exempting oil and gas activity in US Gulf from Endangered Species Act compliance

item.title: Brazilian player wins $515 million vessel contracts with Petrobras
item.description: Belov Engenharia to supply four SDSVs to aid operations offshore Brazil

item.title: Fugro wins Petrobras contract for Brazil’s first offshore wind project
item.description: Pilot plant will be implemented off the coast of Rio de Janeiro state

item.title: SLB OneSubsea forging ahead with 2026 plans amid Middle East volatility
item.description: CEO tells Upstream that dialogues with customers ‘continue as they are’ in long-cycle business

item.title: Kazakhstan readies major exploration offerings for international majors
item.description: State player KazMunayGaz is offering 22 onshore and offshore blocks that could hold in-place resources of over 34 million barrels of oil equivalent

item.title: Golar LNG will consider sale or merger as part of strategic review
item.description: Goldman Sachs appointed to explore strategic alternatives for floating LNG specialist

item.title: ReconAfrica begins crucial well testing operations onshore Namibia
item.description: Junior company hopes production tests on frontier Kavango West-1X probe will be successful

item.title: Fire breaks out on oil tanker after attack offshore Dubai
item.description: Tanker and container ship report attacks as US presses Iran to agree to a peace deal

item.title: CCS milestone reached on FPSO operating offshore Angola
item.description: The Agogo FPSO owned by Yinson Production is operating offshore Angola

item.title: Eco appoints exploration veteran as new chair
item.description: Former Africa Oil boss now leads junior player's board

item.title: Japex drills potentially game-changing offshore well
item.description: Discovered gas volumes could reduce Japan’s dependence on imported LNG

item.title: CNOOC Ltd achieves record production in 2025
item.description: CNOOC Limited continues multibillion-dollar capital expenditure to boost exploration

item.title: Philippines procures Russian oil to avert supply shortages
item.description: Long-term US ally has declared a national ‘energy emergency’

item.title: Timor-Leste offshore development steps closer to FID
item.description: Finder Energy receives key approval for Kuda Tasi and Jahal oilfields project
